message:
fix(web): rename WGSL variable 'meta' to 'glyph_meta_entry' for Chrome 144+ compatibility

- Chrome 144+ reserves 'meta' as a WGSL keyword, causing shader
  compilation failures in the WebGPU renderer
- Rename the local variable throughout the glyph rendering shader
  to avoid the reserved word conflict (bd-83al1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
